sources.title: Jeannie (restored, colorized) (1941, drama, imdb score: 7.1)
sources.description: Jeannie (also known as Girl in Distress ) is a 1941 British romantic comedy film directed by Harold French and starring Barbara Mullen , Michael Redgrave , and Albert Lieven . The film's sets were designed by Duncan Sutherland . Based on a play of the same name by Aimée Stuart , it was loosely remade in 1957 as Let's Be Happy .

metadata.Plot: Based on Aimée Stuart's play. Little Scots girl decides to use her inheritance for a grand tour of the Continent.
metadata.Writer: Roland Pertwee, Aimée Stuart, Anatole de Grunwald
metadata.Actors: Barbara Mullen, Michael Redgrave, Wilfrid Lawson
